Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows that seafood may be great on its own, but when bringing different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.
Video.title: Mixed

Video.summary: Morel mushrooms grow from the ashes of a forest fire and travel thousands of miles to the kitchen.
Video.title: Morels

Video.summary: Cranberries travel from a Nova Scotia farm to a Thanksgiving feast.
Video.title: Cranberries

Video.summary: Soft prawn from the waters of Vancouver travels to a beach-side grill.
Video.title: Spot Prawns

Video.summary: A look at the journey of organic asparagus from a family farm in Ontario to a backyard BBQ.
Video.title: Asparagus

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.
Video.title: Butter

Video.summary: Vanessa prepares four multi-cooker dishes, including seafood stew and roast beef.
Video.title: Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days

Image.alt: Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: flavored oils.
Video.title: Oil

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts adds bread and pastry to Canadian cod and squid.
Video.title: Breaded

Video.summary: Spencer Watts shows how to enjoy fish served cold with arctic char pate & tequila shrimp ceviche.
Video.title: Cold

Video.summary: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts brings the party with mojito marinated mahi mahi, cosmo crab hush puppies and coconut, rum and pineapple king crab.
Video.title: Cocktails

Video.summary: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts showcases the perfect pairing of vinegar and fish with balsamic marinated walleye, gastrique lobster and crawfish popcorn.
Video.title: Vinegar

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.
Video.title: Saucy

Video.summary: Italian chef and food guru Vanessa Gianfrancesco demonstrates how to make fresh pasta like an Italian, and then uses that pasta to create everything from fettucine alfredo to tortelloni to lasagna bianca.
Video.title: Fresh Pasta

Video.summary: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant reveals the secrets behind Bangkok's famous street food with pork skewers, noodle soup, five-spice pork belly soup, and pandan coconut custard fondue.
Video.title: Thai Street Food

Video.summary: Japanese-German chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen fixes up chicken hotpot, chicken skewers, meat and potato, and a sweet custard.
Video.title: Japanese Comfort Food

Video.summary: Vanessa Giangrancesco shares her favorite Italian Brunch recipes.
Video.title: Italian Brunch

Video.summary: Champagne, lobster and homemade scones, Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up an indulgent brunch.
Video.title: Champagne Brunch

Video.summary: Brunch is the most important meal of the weekend; Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up healthy and delicious recipes that'll awaken the taste buds.
Video.title: Healthy Start

Video.summary: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up her twist on a traditional pancake brunch with savoury, sweet and crispy recipes.
Video.title: Pancake Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four decadent recipes including an indulgent Breakfast Poutine and chocolate Stuffed French Toast.
Video.title: Up All Night Brunch

Video.summary: Skip the utensils and gather for chef Vanessa's Pick Up Your Brunch; Featuring Sticky Pull-Apart Praline Bread and an extra cheesy Monte Cristo Sandwich.
Video.title: Pick Up Your Brunch

Video.summary: Inspired by flaky, buttery and chocolaty dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la.
Video.title: French Brunch

Video.summary: Chef Kimberly Lallouz is in her test kitchen making her surf and turf multi-course dinner.
Video.title: Surf and Turf

Video.summary: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine; the region balances simplicity with intensity through flavorful dishes; an antipasto of folded flatbread with ricotta and fennel seeds inspires with its intricate beauty and a simple recipe.
Video.title: Sicily

Video.summary: A soy, miso and honey sauce to accompany a seared turkey breast; a black demi-glace to accompany a beef tenderloin and a duxelles sauce.
Video.title: Savoury

Video.summary: Cajun kick-off sauce with soft-shell crabs; a classic steakhouse mustard sauce and a ginger caramel sauce.
Video.title: Spice

Video.summary: A classic beef Marsala; a thick white chicken sauce with wine; a port sabayon with grapes.
Video.title: Wine

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by China, Canada, Peru, and Mexico.
Video.title: China, Canada, Peru, Mexico

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by the USA, Canada, Mexico, and Suriname.
Video.title: USA, Canada, Mexico, Suriname

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Portugal, Argentina, India, and Japan.
Video.title: Portugal, Argentina, India, Japan

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Israel, Indonesia, Korea, and Iran.
Video.title: Israel, Indonesia, Korea, Iran

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Scotland, France, the USA, and Myanmar.
Video.title: Scotland, France, USA, Myanmar

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Turkey, Honduras, China, and Nigeria.
Video.title: Turkey, Honduras, China, Nigeria

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Lebanon, Mexico, Greece, and the UK.
Video.title: Lebanon, Mexico, Greece, UK

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Italy, the USA, Ukraine, and Portugal.
Video.title: Italy, USA, Ukraine, Portugal

Video.summary: Chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks his signature brand of over-the-top, calorically dense comfort food, all while working in a smidge of food science, and a bit of foul language for good measure.
Video.title: Spaghetti & Meatballs

Video.summary: Dive into a sensory feast; a show where the sounds of cooking and eating take center stage in an auditory experience; whether seeking relaxation, focus, or just a moment of pure indulgence, this show will leave people craving more.
Video.title: Bread
